results.title: Singapore International Choral Festival a delightful showcase of talents from around the world
results.description: The Singapore International Choral Festival, organised by One Choral Company and Rave Group, is now in its 10th edition.

results.title: General Hospital’s Jason Morgan Fans Have a Big Reason to Celebrate Today
results.description: Fifteen years ago today, Jason Morgan proposed to Sam McCall, giving fans one of the most memorable scenes in General Hospital. From a missing engagement ring to heartfelt words about how far they had come, the rooftop proposal delivered unforgettable moments. results.title: Netflix’s 13 Going on 30 Reboot Brings Back Jennifer Garner, but Is Mark Ruffalo in It?
results.description: Jennifer Garner is officially part of Netflix’s reboot of 13 Going on 30, appearing alongside another familiar face from the beloved 2004 original. Recently published set photos further confirmed the actress’s role in the reimagining.
